mapper.select:
SELECT tdi.district_no, tdi.site_no, tdi.district_nm, tdi.dist_addr, tdi.dist_road_addr, tdi.dist_type_cd, tdi.dist_pic, tdi.dist_view_pic, tdi.dist_lon, tdi.dist_lat, tdi.inst_comp_id1, tmi1.partner_comp_nm AS inst_comp_nm1, tdi.meas_comp_id1, tmi2.partner_comp_nm AS meas_comp_nm1, tdi.inst_comp_id2, tmi3.partner_comp_nm AS inst_comp_nm2, tdi.meas_comp_id2, tmi4.partner_comp_nm AS meas_comp_nm2, tdi.meas_str_ymd, tdi.meas_end_ymd, tdi.dist_offi_nm, tdi.reg_dt, tdi.mod_dt, tdi.dist_zip, tdi.dist_zoom FROM tb_district_info tdi LEFT JOIN tb_maintcomp_info tmi1 ON tmi1.partner_comp_id = tdi.inst_comp_id1 LEFT JOIN tb_maintcomp_info tmi2 ON tmi2.partner_comp_id = tdi.meas_comp_id1 LEFT JOIN tb_maintcomp_info tmi3 ON tmi3.partner_comp_id = tdi.inst_comp_id2 LEFT JOIN tb_maintcomp_info tmi4 ON tmi4.partner_comp_id = tdi.meas_comp_id2 WHERE 1=1
and district_no = #{district_no}

select * from tb_dashboarddata where 1=1
and _cdate > #{cdate}
and _cdate::timestamp > now() - interval '24 hour'
order by "_cdate" asc limit 5

select ta.asset_id, ta.area_id, ta.zone_id, max(ta2.risk_level) as risk_level
from tb_asset ta left outer join (select * from tb_alarm where reg_date::timestamp >= now() - interval '1 minutes') ta2 on ta.asset_id = ta2.asset_id
group by ta.asset_id, ta.area_id, ta.zone_id

SELECT count(*) as total_cnt , count(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 END) AS receive_cnt , count(CASE WHEN status = '2' THEN 1 END) AS not_receive_cnt FROM tb_asset WHERE asset_kind_id IN ('2','3','4','6','7')
SELECT count(*) as total_cnt , count(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 END) AS receive_cnt , count(CASE WHEN status = '2' THEN 1 END) AS not_receive_cnt FROM tb_asset WHERE asset_kind_id = '8'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (tad.sens_no, tad.sens_chnl_id, tad.alarm_lvl_cd) tad.mgnt_no, tad.sens_no, tad.meas_dt, tsi.sens_nm, tdi.district_nm, tad.sens_chnl_id, tad.alarm_lvl_cd, tad.formul_data, tad.net_err_yn, tad.maint_sts_cd, tai."1st_lvl_max" AS max1, tai."1st_lvl_min" AS min1, tai."2nd_lvl_max" AS max2, tai."2nd_lvl_min" AS min2, tai."3rd_lvl_max" AS max3, tai."3rd_lvl_min" AS min3, tai."4th_lvl_max" AS max4, tai."4th_lvl_min" AS min4, tad.reg_dt, tst.sens_tp_nm, tad.view_flag FROM tb_alarm_details tad LEFT JOIN tb_district_info tdi ON tad.district_no = tdi.district_no LEFT JOIN tb_sensor_info tsi ON tad.sens_no = tsi.sens_no LEFT JOIN tb_alarm_info tai ON tad.sens_no = tai.sens_no LEFT JOIN tb_sensor_type tst ON tsi.senstype_no = tst.senstype_no WHERE 1=1 AND tad.view_flag = #{view_flag} ORDER BY tad.sens_no, tad.sens_chnl_id, tad.alarm_lvl_cd, tad.reg_dt DESC ) dedup ORDER BY dedup.reg_dt DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT c.district_nm, a.sens_no, a.senstype_no, d.sens_tp_nm, a.sens_nm, b.logr_nm, a.sect_no, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(a.inst_ymd, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS inst_ymd, md.meas_dt AS latest_meas_dt, COALESCE(m.maint_rslt_cd, 'MTN001') AS sens_status, comm.comm_status, md.formul_data FROM tb_sensor_info a JOIN tb_logger_info b ON a.logr_no = b.logr_no JOIN tb_district_info c ON b.district_no = c.district_no JOIN tb_sensor_type d ON a.senstype_no = d.senstype_no LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT meas_dt, formul_data FROM tb_measure_details m WHERE m.sens_no = a.sens_no ORDER BY m.meas_dt DESC LIMIT 1 ) md ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(BOOL_OR(COALESCE(lmd.err_cnt, 999999) >= a.nonrecv_limit_min), TRUE) THEN '미수신' ELSE '수신' END AS comm_status FROM tb_sensor_chnl ch LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - m3.meas_dt)) / 60 - 1 AS err_cnt FROM tb_measure_details m3 WHERE m3.sens_no = ch.sens_no AND m3.sens_chnl_id = ch.sens_chnl_id ORDER BY m3.meas_dt DESC LIMIT 1 ) lmd ON TRUE WHERE ch.sens_no = a.sens_no ) comm ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT maint_rslt_cd FROM tb_maint_details m2 WHERE m2.sens_no = a.sens_no ORDER BY m2.maint_accpt_ymd DESC LIMIT 1 ) m ON TRUE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY c.district_nm, a.senstype_no, a.sens_no
LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}
